visible_launch_definition: successful TokenCreated stream event detected by is_successful_launch_create
attempted_launch_definition: Tier 3 rich-tracked mint written to attempt_ledger.csv
prior_max_attempted_launches_behavior: enforced before attempt_ledger admission; capped launches could be absent from compact artifacts
new_max_attempted_launches_behavior: applies to Tier 3 rich tracking only; Tier 1 all-launch intake is recorded first
